headline: Assessing Duke Energy (DUK) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent price moves in Duke Energy stock Duke Energy (DUK) has seen its stock price under pressure recently, with returns down 2.3% over the past day and 4.6% over the past week, extending declines through the past month. See our latest analysis for Duke Energy. Short term momentum has been weak, with the share price down 6.8% over the past month and 8.8% over 90 days. However, longer term total shareholder returns of 5.8% over one year and 49.2% over three years show a very different picture...
